subcodes.first_line: O Thou Manifestation of Munificence, Sovereign of Being! Some time ago a letter was dispatched, and strands of pearls were scattered therein, and a word of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت جود سلطان وجود چندی پیش نامه ارسال گشت و عقد لئالی نثار شد و حرفی از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
